reviews.review_title: A Must-Have VR Fire Safety Training Tool
reviews.review_description: I recently tried the OneBonsai VR FireTraining app and was impressed! It offers an immersive way to learn fire safety and techniques. The VR experience feels real, guiding you through evacuation steps and choosing the right fire extinguisher for different fires. The PASS method is clearly explained, making it memorable. The app is well-designed, easy to navigate, and runs smoothly on my Meta Quest 3. Its “comfortable” and “roomscale” settings make it accessible for VR beginners. It’s amazing to learn an important life skill in such an engaging way. Highly recommend it! Excited to see what else they come up with!

Good educational content (multiple scenarios, multiple extinguisher types, ...)
Smooth gameplay and framerate
Free trial version is worth it but a bit short
Overall very useful training!
